items.title: Separating signal from noise in coding evaluations

items.title: Australian Payments Plus moves faster with ChatGPT and Codex

items.title: Progress from our Frontier Red Team

items.title: Charting a path to AI accountability

items.lead_paragraph: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

items.title: Anthropic's core views on AI safety
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: AI progress may lead to transformative AI systems in the next decade, but we do not yet understand how to make such systems safe and aligned with human values. In response, we are pursuing a variety of research directions aimed at better understanding, evaluating, and aligning AI systems.
